case_title: OPORTUN INC. (FORMERLY PROGRESS FINANCIAL CORP.) VS. BYRON DOMINGO ROCAEL

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF MAR-14-2017 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF MAR-14-2017 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. PLAINTIFF OPORTUN, INC. IS PRESENT. REPRESENTED BY NANCY ANGEL-HERRERA, LEGAL COLLECTION SPECIALIST. DEFENDANT BRYON DOMINGO ROCAEL IS NOT PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL; CLERK: J. MURPHY; NOT REPORTED. (506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAR-14-2017 - JUDGMENT.
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY PLAINTIFF OPORTUN INC. (FORMERLY PROGRESS FINANCIAL CORP.)
